If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.69-3 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/folder/13176726/test-cases/41237090 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** lattelover1412+090511@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** Win11/Chrome **App Component:** Other ## Action Performed: 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Register as a new user to the app 3. Select “Manage my team’s expenses” and click Continue 4. Add a name for your business 5. Fill out a first & last name 6. Create a #room in the workspace 7. Click on the header of the room and navigate to Members 8. Click on the Invite button at the top 9. Invite an email address that does not have an expensify account (Should be a real account with an inbox that can receive the invite) 10. Open the Invitation mail box that was sent to the new user (step 9) ## Expected Result: After user invite email address that does not have an expensify account, a whisper message with option "invite to chat" displayed and invitation mail box should be sent then user able to proceed further steps. ## Actual Result: There is no whisper message "invite to chat" displayed and The member invited through the mentioned way doesn't get the invite email Note: There is closed git https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues/74788 ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fb0b0559-85f5-4e77-bf15-e9ccd8ddbdbe [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.69-3 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** No **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/folder/13176726/test-cases/41237088 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** lattelover1412+09054@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** android **App Component:** Other ## Action Performed: Setup - Can be executed in a Secondary device or browser 1. Log in as an admin of a workspace or create one 2. Click on the Invite Member button 3. Add an email address that does not have an Expensify account >> set Admin Role 4. Click Invite (Should be a real account with an inbox that can receive the invite) Main Device 1. User is not logged in 2. Open the email inbox of the invited user 3. Click on the bottom link "Open it in Expensify" 4. Verify that you are redirected to the workspace chat 5. Tap back arrow (the top left) to return Home page ## Expected Result: A blank page should not be displayed, and appropriate page with bottom button (Home, Account, Spend, etc) should be displayed after user tap back arrow ## Actual Result: Endless loading with white blank page displayed, user is not able to proceed further steps. Note: close the app and relaunch, user is able to open Home page ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/249d4eb2-56e6-4634-8b4c-0cb9c661042d [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
